meaning: 韦兰[加拿大东南部港市](临韦兰运河) ;Canal 韦兰运河
examples: I have seen Lovell Mingott; and also Mr. Welland. They all named you.
"Well — it's queer to have brought Miss Welland, anyhow," some one said in a low tone, with a side - glance at Archer.
As he went out into the wintry night, New York again became vast and imminent, and May Welland the loveliest woman in it.
Evelyn Crawford, 69, of Welland, died on Saturday after contracting the rare flesh-attacking bacterial infection necrotising fasciitis (NF).
Jo Woodhams's children attended the Charteris centre in Welland and now uses the centre for a youth group.
